summary:
Endothelial cells secrete von Willebrand factor as indicated by its response to drugs like desmopressin, which act via these cells. This indicates a direct link between endothelial cell function and von Willebrand factor production. \boxed{Endothelial Cells}

The summary captures the essential point about the relationship between endothelial cells and von Willebrand factor secretion based on drug-induced responses. It maintains clarity while focusing only on clinically significant aspects related to identifying the source of this clotting protein.
